videos.headline: Tre Harris scores TD to give Ole Miss lead in final minute
videos.description: Jaxson Dart finds Tre Harris for an Ole Miss touchdown to take the lead in the final minute.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tre Harris scores TD to give Ole Miss lead in final minute) 2023/09/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ole Miss fans rush the field after hanging on to defeat LSU
videos.description: LSU fails to reach the end zone on their final play as Ole Miss holds on to a big win and the fans rush the field.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ole Miss fans rush the field after hanging on to defeat LSU) 2023/09/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ole Miss strikes first with 4th-down TD
videos.description: Ole Miss takes an early lead with a Quinshon Judkins receiving touchdown on fourth down.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ole Miss strikes first with 4th-down TD) 2023/09/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ole Miss scoops up fumble after Jayden Daniels takes massive hit
videos.description: Jayden Daniels fumbles after getting crushed near the sideline, and Ole Miss recovers the ball.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ole Miss scoops up fumble after Jayden Daniels takes massive hit) 2023/09/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ulysses Bentley IV runs free for 43-yard Ole Miss TD
videos.description: Ulysses Bentley IV takes the handoff and finds the end zone to give Ole Miss a 14-0 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ulysses Bentley IV runs free for 43-yard Ole Miss TD) 2023/09/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Brian Thomas Jr. makes athletic grab for an LSU TD
videos.description: Jayden Daniels finds Brian Thomas Jr. in the corner of the end zone for an LSU touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One Play (Brian Thomas Jr. makes athletic grab for an LSU TD) 2023/09/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jaxson Dart delivers dime to Jordan Watkins for 63-yard TD
videos.description: Jaxson Dart finds Jordan Watkins over the middle for a 63-yard Ole Miss touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jaxson Dart delivers dime to Jordan Watkins for 63-yard TD) 2023/09/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Logan Diggs punches in 1-yard TD for LSU
videos.description: Logan Diggs takes the handoff and crosses the goal line for an LSU touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Logan Diggs punches in 1-yard TD for LSU) 2023/09/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: LSU's blown coverage leads to wide-open Ole Miss TD
videos.description: Jaxson Dart finds Dayton Wade with no one around him for a 15-yard Ole Miss touchdown.

videos.headline: Brian Thomas Jr. hauls in his 2nd TD for LSU
videos.description: Jayden Daniels throws a nice pass over the shoulder of Brian Thomas Jr. for an LSU touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Brian Thomas Jr. hauls in his 2nd TD for LSU) 2023/09/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jayden Daniels delivers perfect pass for 29-yard LSU TD
videos.description: Jayden Daniels delivers a pass right into the hands of Kyren Lacy for a 29-yard LSU touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One Play (Jayden Daniels delivers perfect pass for 29-yard LSU TD) 2023/09/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jayden Daniels piles in for 1-yard LSU TD
videos.description: Jayden Daniels pushes forward with the pile to give LSU a 35-31 lead over Ole Miss.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jayden Daniels piles in for 1-yard LSU TD) 2023/09/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Logan Diggs runs up the middle for 12-yard LSU TD
videos.description: Logan Diggs runs hard to find the end zone and extend LSU's lead over Ole Miss.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Logan Diggs runs up the middle for 12-yard LSU TD) 2023/09/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jaxson Dart hurdles LSU defender on 28-yard scamper
videos.description: Jaxson Dart finds space and hurdles a defender on exciting 28-yard run for Ole Miss.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jaxson Dart hurdles LSU defender on 28-yard scamper) 2023/09/330 ESHEET

videos.headline: Quinshon Judkins powers in an 11-yard Ole Miss TD
videos.description: Quinshon Judkins overpowers his defenders and fights his way in for an 11-yard Ole Miss touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Quinshon Judkins powers in an 11-yard Ole Miss TD) 2023/09/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jayden Daniels and Brian Thomas Jr. connect for 3rd TD of the game
videos.description: Jayden Daniels gets a free play after an Ole Miss' offside and heaves a TD pass to Brian Thomas Jr.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jayden Daniels and Brian Thomas Jr. connect for 3rd TD of the game) 2023/09/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jaxson Dart finds the end zone on 1-yard Ole Miss TD
videos.description: Jaxson Dart pushes the pile into the end zone and scores a touchdown for Ole Miss.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jaxson Dart finds the end zone on 1-yard Ole Miss TD) 2023/09/23 ESHEET
